title: Dry Bulk Shipping - June 23, 2026
summary: The dry bulk shipping market continues to demonstrate seasonal resilience, with profitable freight rates and a positive outlook. Iron ore volumes are outperforming expectations, while coal volumes represent a localized weakness. The overall bullish trajectory is expected to persist through the second half of the year, despite potential risks such as government interventions and high iron ore inventories.
